summary: Ukrainian forces used an FPV drone to destroy a Russian field depot storing TM-62 anti-tank mines, triggering a large detonation. Russian operators from the "Rubicon" Center intercepted over 2,000 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, with 75% belonging to 12 specific models, and reported destroying 110 targets on April 11 and 191 on April 13, including coordination with Russian Aerospace Forces to neutralize launch sites. In the Donetsk direction, the 36th Marine Brigade survived a Russian FPV drone attack, with footage showing a soldier using a drone detector to anticipate the strike. Ukrainian forces also used FPV drones to kill two Russian soldiers on motorcycles and a Russian soldier who attempted to fake surrender and flee.
